verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When pangs of death Seized on my soul, Unto the Lord I cried, Till Jesus came and made me whole, I would not be denied.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I would not be denied, I would not be denied, Till Jesus came and made me whole, I would not be denied.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As Jacob in the days of old, I wrestled with the Lord; And instant, with a courage bold, I stood upon His word.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Old Satan said my Lord was gone And would not hear my prayer, But, praise the Lord! The work is done And Christ the Lord is here.
